case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. KELVIN SARMIENTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,301.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, KELVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.94) SERVED FEB-19-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, KELVIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-13-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, KELVIN $1,301.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,346.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
